subject: refactor(content): move text alignment from Structure to Content tab
body:
Alignment controls are now in the Content tab as a collapsible section
below the text editors. This makes more sense — alignment is a content
concern, not a structure concern, and it naturally follows the same
cell selector used for editing text.

Removed from LayoutTab: alignment icons, options, helper functions,
Text Alignment CollapsibleSection, getCellInfo import, unused destructured vars.

Tags: content, layout, ux, simplification
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: content-editing
Semver: minor

title: move text alignment from Structure to Content tab
